decisions.label: Are Vendor Program Training Requirement Links Found

decisions.name: Does_External_Training_Assignment_Exist
decisions.label: Does External Training Assignment Exist
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No - Prepare New External Training Assignment

decisions.name: Has_New_Training_Assignments_To_Create
decisions.label: Has New Training Assignments To Create
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No - No New Assignments To Create

decisions.name: Has_Training_Assignment_Onboarding_Links_To_Create
decisions.label: Has Training Assignment Onboarding Links To Create

decisions.name: Does_Training_Assignment_Onboarding_Link_Exist
decisions.label: Does Training Assignment Onboarding Link Exist
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No - Create Training Assignment Onboarding Link

decisions.label: How Are We Getting Training Requirements

decisions.name: Is_Training_Requirement_External
decisions.label: Is Training Requirement External
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No - Training Requirement is Not External
